chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 959 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of CMA 4548/2020 3.For hearing of main case 02-05-2023 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Kamran Mobeen, Advocate for the respondent No.3 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition; however, states that the petitioner for redressal of his grievances shall approach the concerned authority and Special Court for Cooperative Societies, established under the Sindh Cooperative Societies Act, 2020. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed application leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the concerned forums for redressal of his grievances, if he is so advised. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
